---
name: Feature Request | 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for MAARS | 为 MAARS 提出想法
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

Please fill this out in English or Chinese.
请使用英文或中文填写。

## Problem | 问题背景
What problem does this feature solve?
这个功能希望解决什么问题？

## Proposed solution | 方案建议
Describe the feature you'd like.
描述你希望增加的功能或改动。

## Which stage / mode does this affect? | 影响的阶段 / 模式
- [ ] Refine
- [ ] Plan
- [ ] Execute
- [ ] Write
- [ ] Mock mode
- [ ] Gemini mode
- [ ] Agent mode
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered | 备选方案
Any alternative solutions you've thought about.
你是否考虑过其他替代方案？

## Additional context | 补充信息
Any other context, mockups, or references.
补充背景、草图或参考资料。
